sections.title: Data controller
paragraphs: El Travieso Vermouth S.L. is the controller of personal data collected through this website.

sections.title: Purpose and legal basis
paragraphs: We process data to manage accounts, orders, marketing (with consent) and platform security under GDPR.

sections.title: Your rights
paragraphs: You may access, rectify, erase, restrict or port your data, and withdraw consent at any time by contacting us.
